stemHtml: What are the consequences of incorrectly inputting 124 kt instead of 142 kt as the V1 speed in the EFB for a take-off, particularly if one engine becomes inoperative?

options.a: The aircraft would overrun the runway in case of an engine failure before V1.
options.b: Due to the lower V1, the aircraft would rotate and become airborne earlier.
options.c: The aircraft would have an increased take-off distance and reduced obstacle clearance.
options.d: No significant consequence, as V1 does not directly affect the decision point for rotation.
